scripts.build: pnpm --filter @paycrawl/shared build && pnpm --filter @paycrawl/gateway build && pnpm --filter @paycrawl/web build && pnpm --filter @paycrawl/agent build
scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @paycrawl/gateway lint && pnpm --filter @paycrawl/web lint && pnpm --filter @paycrawl/agent lint && pnpm --filter @paycrawl/shared lint
scripts.format:check: prettier --check .github README.md SECURITY.md apps packages eslint.config.mjs package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json --ignore-unknown
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @paycrawl/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @paycrawl/gateway typecheck && pnpm --filter @paycrawl/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @paycrawl/agent typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @paycrawl/shared build && pnpm --filter @paycrawl/shared test && pnpm --filter @paycrawl/gateway test && pnpm --filter @paycrawl/agent test
